Patient seen at St. Mary Hospital by Dr. John Smith on 01/15/2023.
Chief complaint: Follow-up for diabetes management.
Assessment: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus, well controlled.
Plan: Continue Metformin 500mg daily. Follow up in 3 months.

<!-- Source: file: records.pdf, page: 25, file_id: abc123, paragraph_ref: p002 -->
City Clinic visit dated 02/20/2023.
Patient: John Doe
Blood pressure elevated at 150/95.
Assessment: Hypertension, new diagnosis.
Plan: Start Lisinopril 10mg daily.

Routine cleaning performed.
No cavities found.
